keyPoints: The goal is to provide a set of documents for tasks like clustering and summarization.
This introduces students to unsupervised or semi-supervised NLP tasks.
It focuses on processing multiple texts to find overarching patterns or themes.
commonMistakes: Confusing document clustering (unsupervised grouping) with classification (supervised labeling).
Attempting to summarize a set of documents without first identifying the central themes common across them.
